name: vro-ai-studio
description: AI-powered action generator, code reviewer, test generator and workflow explainer for VMware Aria Orchestrator

commands.title: vRO AI Studio: Generate Action from Selection
vRO AI Studio: Review This File
vRO AI Studio: Generate Tests for This File
vRO AI Studio: Explain Selected Code

vroAiStudio.apiKey.description: Anthropic API key (or leave empty to use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var)

vroAiStudio.apiEndpoint.description: Claude API endpoint — override for air-gapped / internal proxy deployments

enumDescriptions: Use a local OpenAI-compatible API (e.g. Ollama)
Use AnythingLLM via its native workspace chat API
vroAiStudio.llmProvider.description: Which LLM backend to use for all AI operations

vroAiStudio.localLlmEndpoint.description: Base URL for the local LLM. For AnythingLLM: http://localhost:3001. For OpenAI-compatible (Ollama): full path e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions

vroAiStudio.localLlmApiKey.description: Bearer token / API key for the local LLM

vroAiStudio.localLlmModel.description: For AnythingLLM: workspace slug (e.g. 'my-workspace'). For OpenAI-compatible: model name (e.g. 'llama3').

vroAiStudio.autoReviewOnSave.description: Automatically review vRO files on save and show diagnostics

vroAiStudio.insertGeneratedCode.description: Insert generated action code at cursor position

vroAiStudio.codingStandardsFile.description: Path to a file containing your team's vRO coding standards (e.g. ~/.vro-standards.md). Its contents are injected into Review and Generate prompts automatically.

vroAiStudio.utilityReposFile.description: Path to a file listing your internal vRO utility/library repos (e.g. ~/.vro-repos.txt).
